verses.geez: ወበጽሖሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ስምዖን ፡ ካልእ ፡ ክፍል ፡ ወኮነ ፡ ርስቶሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ማእከሎሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ይሁዳ ።

translations.lxx: And the second lot came out for the children of Symeon; and their inheritance was in the midst of the lots of the children of Juda.
translations.kjv: And the second lot came forth to Simeon, even for the tribe of the children of Simeon according to their families: and their inheritance was within the inheritance of the children of Judah.

verses.geez: ወረከቦሙ ፡ መክፈልቶሙ ፡ ቤርሳቤሕ ፡ ወሶማሕ ፡ ወቆለደም ።

translations.lxx: And their lot was Beersabee, and Samaa, and Caladam,
translations.kjv: And they had in their inheritance Beersheba, and Sheba, and Moladah,

verses.geez: ወአርሶላ ፡ ወበላ ፡ ወኢያሶን ።

translations.lxx: and Arsola, and Bola, and Jason,
translations.kjv: And Hazarshual, and Balah, and Azem,

verses.geez: ወልዑላ ፡ ወቡል ፡ ወኤርማ ።

translations.lxx: and Erthula, and Bula, and Herma,
translations.kjv: And Eltolad, and Bethul, and Hormah,

verses.geez: ወሲቄላቅ ፡ ወቤተ ፡ ማኬሬብ ፡ ወሰርሱሲን ።

translations.lxx: and Sikelac, and Bæthmachereb, and Sarsusin,
translations.kjv: And Ziklag, and Bethmarcaboth, and Hazarsusah,

verses.geez: ወ[በተ]ሮት ፡ ወአሕቅልቲሆን ፡ ዐሥሩ ፡ ወሠላስ ፡ አህጉር ፡ ወአዕጻዳቲሆን ።

translations.lxx: and Batharoth, and their fields, thirteen cities, and their villages.
translations.kjv: And Bethlebaoth, and Sharuhen; thirteen cities and their villages:

verses.geez: ወሬሞን ፡ ወተልካ ፡ ወኢያቴር ፡ ወአሳ ፡ አርባዕ ፡ አህጉር ፡ ወአዕጻዳቲሆን ።

translations.lxx: Eremmon, and Thalcha, and Jether, and Asan; four cities and their villages,
translations.kjv: Ain, Remmon, and Ether, and Ashan; four cities and their villages:

verses.geez:
ወዘዐውዶን ፡ ለእላንቱ ፡ አህጉር ፡ እስከ ፡ ባሌቅ ፡ ወየኀልፍ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ባሜት ፡ መንገለ ፡ አዜባ ፡ ወዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ
                  ፡ ርስቶሙ ፡ ለነገደ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ስምዖን ።

translations.lxx: round about their cities as far as Balec as men go to Bameth southward: this is the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Symeon according to their families.
translations.kjv: And all the villages that were round about these cities to Baalathbeer, Ramath of the south. This is the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Simeon according to their families.

verses.geez:
እስመ ፡ ኮነ ፡ መክፈልቶሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ይሁዳ ፡ ዐቢየ ፡ እምነ ፡ ዚአሆሙ ፡ ወወረሱ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ስምዖን ፡ ማእከለ ፡
                  መክፈልቶሙ ።

translations.lxx: The inheritance of the tribe of the children of Symeon was a part of the lot of Juda, for the portion of the children of Juda was greater than theirs; and the children of Symeon inherited in the midst of their lot.
translations.kjv: Out of the portion of the children of Judah was the inheritance of the children of Simeon: for the part of the children of Judah was too much for them: therefore the children of Simeon had their inheritance within the inheritance of them.

verses.geez:
ወረከቦሙ ፡ ሣልስ ፡ መክፈልት ፡ ለዛቡሎን ፡ በበ ፡ ሕዘቢሆሙ ፤ ኮነ ፡ ደወለ ፡ ርስቶሙ ፡ ኤሴዴ[ቅ] ፡ ጎላ ፡ ደወሎሙ
                  ፤

translations.lxx: And the third lot came out to Zabulon according to their families: the bounds of their inheritance shall be—Esedekgola shall be their border,
translations.kjv: And the third lot came up for the children of Zebulun according to their families: and the border of their inheritance was unto Sarid:

verses.geez:
እምነ ፡ ባሕር ፡ ወመጌሬላ ፡ ወይትአኀዝ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ቤተ ፡ ራባ ፡ እንተ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቈላት ፡ እንተ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ ገጸ ፡
                  ለኢየቀመን ።

translations.lxx: the sea and Magelda, and it shall reach to Bætharaba in the valley, which is opposite Jekman.
translations.kjv: And their border went up toward the sea, and Maralah, and reached to Dabbasheth, and reached to the river that is before Jokneam;

verses.geez:
ወተመይጠ ፡ እምነ ፡ ሰዱቅ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ ጽባሒሃ ፡ ለቤተ ፡ ሳሚ[ስ] ፡ ዲበ ፡ ደወለ ፡ ከሴሎቴት ፡ ወየኀልፍ ፡
                  እንተ ፡ ዳቢሮት ፡ ወየዐርግ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ፌጤ ።

translations.lxx: And the border returned from Sedduc in a contrary direction eastward from Bæthsamys, to the borders of Chaselothaith, and shall pass on to Dabiroth, and shall proceed upward to Phangai.
translations.kjv: And turned from Sarid eastward toward the sunrising unto the border of Chislothtabor, and then goeth out to Daberath, and goeth up to Japhia,

verses.geez:
ወእምህየ ፡ የኀልፍ ፡ እንተ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ ጽባሒሃ ፡ ለሀገረ ፡ ጌቤሬ ፡ እንተ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ሴም ፡ ወየኀልፍ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ሬሞን
                  ፡ ዘአምተርዮዛ ።

translations.lxx: And thence it shall come round in the opposite direction eastward to Gebere to the city of Catasem, and shall go on to Remmonaa Matharaoza.
translations.kjv: And from thence passeth on along on the east to Gittahhepher, to Ittahkazin, and goeth out to Remmonmethoar to Neah;

verses.geez: ወየኀልፍ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ መስዐ ፡ አሞት ፡ ወይከውን ፡ ሞጻእቶሙ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ጌፋሔል ፡ እንተ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ነት ።

translations.lxx: And the borders shall come round northward to Amoth, and their going out shall be at Gæphael,
translations.kjv: And the border compasseth it on the north side to Hannathon: and the outgoings thereof are in the valley of Jiphthahel:

verses.geez: ወነባሐል ፡ ወሲሞዖን ፡ ወኢየሪከ ፡ ወሜትሜን ።

translations.lxx: and Catanath, and Nabaal, and Symoön, and Jericho, and Bæthman.
translations.kjv: And Kattath, and Nahallal, and Shimron, and Idalah, and Bethlehem: twelve cities with their villages.

verses.geez: ዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ርስቶሙ ፡ ለነገደ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ዛቡሎን ፡ በበ ፡ ሕዘቢሆሙ ፡ አህጉር ፡ ወአዕጻዳቲሆን ።

translations.lxx: This is the inheritance of the tribe of the sons of Zabulon according to their families, these cities and their villages.
translations.kjv: This is the inheritance of the children of Zebulun according to their families, these cities with their villages.

verses.geez: ወረከቦ ፡ ለይሳኮር ፡ ራብዕ ፡ መክፈልት ።

translations.lxx: And the fourth lot came out to Issachar.
translations.kjv: And the fourth lot came out to Issachar, for the children of Issachar according to their families.

verses.geez: ወኮነ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ኢያዜር ፡ ወከልሰሎት ፡ ወሱሳን ።

translations.lxx: And their borders were Jazel, and Chasaloth, and Sunam,
translations.kjv: And their border was toward Jezreel, and Chesulloth, and Shunem,

verses.geez: ወአጊን ፡ ወሲዮነን ፡ ወርሔቴ ።

translations.lxx: and Agin, and Siona, and Reeroth,
translations.kjv: And Haphraim, and Shihon, and Anaharath,

verses.geez: ወአነከሬት ፡ ወደቢሮት ፡ ወቂሶን ፡ ወሬቤስ ።

translations.lxx: and Anachereth, and Dabiron, and Kison, and Rebes,
translations.kjv: And Rabbith, and Kishion, and Abez,

verses.geez: ወሬመን ፡ ወኤማሬቅ ፡ ወቤርሳቤስ ።

translations.lxx: and Remmas, and Jeon, and Tomman, and Æmarec, and Bersaphes.
translations.kjv: And Remeth, and Engannim, and Enhaddah, and Bethpazzez;

verses.geez:
ወይትአኀዝ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ጌተቦር ፡ ወላዕለ ፡ ሰሊም ፡ እንተ ፡ መንገለ ፡ ባሕር ፡ ወቤተ ፡ ሳሚ[ስ] ፡
                  ወይከውን ፡ ሞጻእተ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ዮርዳንስ ።

translations.lxx: And the boundaries shall border upon Gæthbor, and upon Salim westward, and Bæthsamys; and the extremity of his bounds shall be Jordan.
translations.kjv: And the coast reacheth to Tabor, and Shahazimah, and Bethshemesh; and the outgoings of their border were at Jordan: sixteen cities with their villages.

verses.geez: ወዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ርስቶሙ ፡ ለነገዶ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ይሳኮር ፡ በበ ፡ ሕዘቢሆሙ ፡ ወአህጉሪሆሙኒ ፡ ወአዕጻዳቲሆን ።

translations.lxx: This is the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Issachar according to their families, the cities and their villages.
translations.kjv: This is the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Issachar according to their families, the cities and their villages.

verses.geez: ወረከቦሙ ፡ ኃምስ ፡ መክፈልት ፡ ለአሴር ።

translations.lxx: And the fifth lot came out to Aser according to their families.
translations.kjv: And the fifth lot came out for the tribe of the children of Asher according to their families.

verses.geez: ወኮነ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ኤሌኬት ፡ ወአሌፍ ፡ ወቤቶቅ ፡ ወአኬያፋ ።

translations.lxx: And their borders were Exeleketh, and Aleph, and Bæthok, and Keaph,
translations.kjv: And their border was Helkath, and Hali, and Beten, and Achshaph,

verses.geez: ወአሊሜሊ ፡ ወአሚሔል ፡ ወመሐስ ፡ ወይትአኀዝ ፡ በቀርሜሎ ፡ ዘመንገለ ፡ ባሕር ፡ ወበሲዮን ፡ ወለባነት ።

translations.lxx: and Elimelech, and Amiel, and Maasa, and the lot will border on Carmel westward, and on Sion, and Labanath.
translations.kjv: And Alammelech, and Amad, and Misheal; and reacheth to Carmel westward, and to Shihorlibnath;

verses.geez:
እምነ ፡ ጽባሒሁ ፡ ይገብእ ፡ ቤቴጌኔት ፡ ወይትአኀዝ ፡ በዛቡሎን ፡ ወእምጌጌ ፡ ወፍቴሔል ፡ ለመንገለ ፡ መስዕ ፡
                  ወይበውእ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሰፍቴ ፡ ቤተሜኅ ፡ ወኤኔሔል ፡ ወየኀልፍ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኮበም ፡ ወአሶሜል ።

translations.lxx: And it will return westward from Bæthegeneth, and will join Zabulon and Ekgai, and Phthæel northwards, and the borders will come to Saphthæbæthme, and Inael, and will go on to Chobamasomel,
translations.kjv: And turneth toward the sunrising to Bethdagon, and reacheth to Zebulun, and to the valley of Jiphthahel toward the north side of Bethemek, and Neiel, and goeth out to Cabul on the left hand,

verses.geez: ወኤብሮን ፡ ወራአብ ፡ ወኤሜማሖን ፡ ወቀን[ተ]ኔዎስ ፡ [እስከ ፡] ሲዶኖስ ፡ ዐባይ ።

translations.lxx: and Elbon, and Raab, and Ememaon, and Canthan to great Sidon.
translations.kjv: And Hebron, and Rehob, and Hammon, and Kanah, even unto great Zidon;

verses.geez:
ወይገብእ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አራ[ማ] ፡ ወእስከ ፡ ነቅዐ ፡ መስፋጥ ፡ ወ(ስ)ጢርዮን ፡ ወይገብእ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ውስተ
                  ፡ ኢያሲፍ ፡ ወይከውን ፡ ደወለ ፡ ሞጻእቱ ፡ ባሕር ፡ ወእምነ ፡ ሌብ ፡ ወኮዞብ ።

translations.lxx: And the borders shall turn back to Rama, and to the fountain of Masphassat, and the Tyrians; and the borders shall return to Jasiph, and their going forth shall be the sea, and Apoleb, and Echozob,
translations.kjv: And then the coast turneth to Ramah, and to the strong city Tyre; and the coast turneth to Hosah; and the outgoings thereof are at the sea from the coast to Achzib:

verses.geez: ወአርኮብ ፡ ወዓፌቅ ፡ ወራዐው ።

translations.lxx: and Archob, and Aphec, and Raau.
translations.kjv: Ummah also, and Aphek, and Rehob: twenty and two cities with their villages.

verses.geez: ወዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ርስቶሙ ፡ ለነገደ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ አሴር ፡ በበ ፡ ሕዘቢሆሙ ፡ አህጉሪሆሙኒ ፡ ወአዕጻዳቲሆን ።

translations.lxx: This is the inheritance of the tribe of the sons of Aser according to their families, the cities and their villages.
translations.kjv: This is the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Asher according to their families, these cities with their villages.

verses.geez: ወረከቦ ፡ ለንፍታሌም ፡ ሳድስ ፡ ክፍል ።

translations.lxx: And the sixth lot came out to Nephthali.
translations.kjv: The sixth lot came out to the children of Naphtali, even for the children of Naphtali according to their families.

verses.geez:
ወኮነ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ሞሐላም ፡ ወሞላ ፡ ወቤ[ሴ]ሚይን ፡ ወአርሜ ፡ ወናቦ ፡ ወኢያፍቴሜ ፡ እስከ ፡ አኦደም ፡ ወኮነ ፡
                  ሞጻእቶሙ ፡ ዮርዳንስ ።

translations.lxx: And their borders were Moolam, and Mola, and Besemiin, and Arme, and Naboc, and Jephthamai, as far as Dodam; and their goings out were Jordan.
translations.kjv: And their coast was from Heleph, from Allon to Zaanannim, and Adami, Nekeb, and Jabneel, unto Lakum; and the outgoings thereof were at Jordan:

verses.geez:
ወይገብእ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ባሕረ ፡ አናትብሮን ፡ ወየኀልፍ ፡ እምህየ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ኢቀናቃ ፡ ወይትአኀዝ ፡ በዛቡሎን
                  ፡ እመንገለ ፡ አዜብ ፡ ወአሴርሂ ፡ ይትአኀዞሙ ፡ በመንገለ ፡ ባሕር ፡ ወዮርዳንስ ፡ እመንገለ ፡ ጽባሒሁ ።

translations.lxx: And the coasts will return westward by Athabor, and will go out thence to Jacana, and will border on Zabulon southward, and Aser will join it westward, and Jordan eastward.
translations.kjv: And then the coast turneth westward to Aznothtabor, and goeth out from thence to Hukkok, and reacheth to Zebulun on the south side, and reacheth to Asher on the west side, and to Judah upon Jordan toward the sunrising.

verses.geez: ወአህጉረ ፡ ጢሮስሂ ፡ እለ ፡ ቅጽረ ፡ ቦን ፡ ወጢሮስሂ ፡ ወኦሞዳታቄት ፡ ወቄ[ኔ]ሬት ።

translations.lxx: And the walled cities of the Tyrians, Tyre, and Omathadaketh, and Kenereth,
translations.kjv: And the fenced cities are Ziddim, Zer, and Hammath, Rakkath, and Chinnereth,

verses.geez: ወአርሜት ፡ ወአራሔል ፡ ወአሶር ።

translations.lxx: and Armaith, and Arael, and Asor,
translations.kjv: And Adamah, and Ramah, and Hazor,

verses.geez: ወቃዴስ ፡ ወአስራይስ ፡ ወነቅዐ ፡ አሶር ።

translations.lxx: and Cades, and Assari, and the well of Asor;
translations.kjv: And Kedesh, and Edrei, and Enhazor,

verses.geez: ወቄሮኅ ፡ ወሜገላሕርም ፡ ወቤታሜ ፡ ወቴሳሚስ ።

translations.lxx: and Keroe, and Megalaarim, and Bætthame, and Thessamys.
translations.kjv: And Iron, and Migdalel, Horem, and Bethanath, and Bethshemesh; nineteen cities with their villages.

verses.geez: ወዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ርስቶሙ ፡ ለነገደ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ንፍታሌም ።

translations.lxx: This is the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Nephthali.
translations.kjv: This is the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Naphtali according to their families, the cities and their villages.

verses.geez: ወረከቦ ፡ ለዳን ፡ ሳብዕ ፡ ክፍል ።

translations.lxx: And the seventh lot came out to Dan.
translations.kjv: And the seventh lot came out for the tribe of the children of Dan according to their families.

verses.geez: ወኮነ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ሰራሕት ፡ ወኣሳ ፡ ሀገረ ፡ ሳመውስ ።

translations.lxx: And their borders were Sarath, and Asa, and the cities of Sammaus,
translations.kjv: And the coast of their inheritance was Zorah, and Eshtaol, and Irshemesh,

verses.geez: ወሳላቢን ፡ ወአሞን ፡ ወሲላታ ።

translations.lxx: and Salamin, and Ammon, and Silatha,
translations.kjv: And Shaalabbin, and Ajalon, and Jethlah,

verses.geez: ወኤሎን ፡ ወቴምናታ ፡ ወአቃሮን ።

translations.lxx: and Elon, and Thamnatha, and Accaron;
translations.kjv: And Elon, and Thimnathah, and Ekron,

verses.geez: ወለቃታ ፡ ወጌቤቶን ፡ ወጌቤላን ።

translations.lxx: and Alcatha, and Begethon, and Gebeëlan,
translations.kjv: And Eltekeh, and Gibbethon, and Baalath,

verses.geez: ወአዞር ፡ ወቤኔባቅጥ ፡ ወጌትሬሞ ።

translations.lxx: and Azor, and Banæbacat, and Gethremmon.
translations.kjv: And Jehud, and Beneberak, and Gathrimmon,

verses.geez: ወእምነ ፡ ባሕር ፡ ኢየራቆን ፡ ደወል ፡ ዘቅሩበ ፡ ኢዮጴ ።

translations.lxx: And westward of Hieracon the border was near to Joppa.
translations.kjv: And Mejarkon, and Rakkon, with the border before Japho.

verses.geez:
ወዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ርስቶሙ ፡ ለነገደ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ዳን ፡ በበ ፡ ሕዘቢሆሙ ፡ አህጉሪሆሙኒ ፡ ወአዕጻዳቲሆሙኒ ፡
                  ወኢያጠቅዎሙ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ዳን ፡ ለአሞሬዎን ፡ እለ ፡ ያጠውቅዎሙ ፡ በውስተ ፡ ደብር ፡ ወኢያበውሕዎሙ ፡ አሞሬዎን ፡ ይረዱ ፡
                  ውስተ ፡ ቈላት ፡ ወነሥኡ ፡ እምኔሆሙ ፡ አሐደ ፡ ኅብረ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ደወለ ፡ መክፈልቶሙ ።

translations.lxx: and the children of Dan did not drive out the Amorite who afflicted them in the mountain; and the Amorite would not suffer them to come down into the valley, but they forcibly took from them the border of their portion.
translations.kjv: And the coast of the children of Dan went out too little for them: therefore the children of Dan went up to fight against Leshem, and took it, and smote it with the edge of the sword, and possessed it, and dwelt therein, and called Leshem, Dan, after the name of Dan their father.

verses.geez:
ወሖሩ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ [ዳን ፡] ወቀተልዎሙ ፡ ለላኪስ ፡ ወነሥኡ ፡ ሀገሮሙ ፡ ወቀተልዋ ፡ በአፈ ፡ ኀፂን ፡ ወነበሩ ፡
                  ውስቴታ ፡ ወሰመዩ ፡ ስማ ፡ ለሴንዳ[ን] ፡ ወቆሙ ፡ አሞሬዎን ፡ ከመ ፡ ይንበሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኤ[ሎ]ም ፡ ወውስተ ፡ [ሰ]ላሚን
                  ፡ ወጸንዐት ፡ እዴሁ ፡ ለኤፍሬም ፡ ላዕሌሆሙ ፡ ወኮንዎሙ ፡ መጸብሔ ።

translations.lxx: and the Amorite continued to dwell in Edom and in Salamin: and the hand of Ephraim prevailed against them, and they became tributaries to them.
translations.kjv: This is the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Dan according to their families, these cities with their villages.

verses.geez:
ወሖሩ ፡ ይኡድዋ ፡ ለምድር ፡ በውስተ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ወወሀብዎ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ክፍሎ ፡ ለኢየሱስ ፡ በውስቴቶሙ ፡
                  በትእዛዘ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And they proceeded to take possession of the land according to their borders, and the children of Israel gave an inheritance to Joshua the son of Naue among them,
translations.kjv: When they had made an end of dividing the land for inheritance by their coasts, the children of Israel gave an inheritance to Joshua the son of Nun among them:

verses.geez:
ወወሀብዎ ፡ ሀገረ ፡ እንተ ፡ ሰአለ ፡ እንተ ፡ [ትምናስራህ] ፡ እንተ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ደብረ ፡ ኤፍሬም ፡ ወነደቃ ፡ ለይእቲ
                  ፡ ሀገር ፡ ወነበረ ፡ ውስቴታ ።

translations.lxx: by the command of God, and they gave him the city which he asked for, Thamnasarach, which is in the mount of Ephraim; and he built the city, and dwelt in it.
translations.kjv: According to the word of the LORD they gave him the city which he asked, even Timnathserah in mount Ephraim: and he built the city, and dwelt therein.

verses.geez:
ወዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ አክፋሊሆሙ ፡ ዘከመ ፡ አስተዋረስዎሙ ፡ እልዓዛር ፡ ካህን ፡ ወኢየሱስ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ነዌ ፡ ወመላእክተ
                  ፡ አበዊሆሙ ፡ ለነገደ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ በበ ፡ መክፈልቶሙ ፡ በሴሎ ፡ በቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ በኀበ ፡ ኆኅተ ፡ ደብተራ ፡
                  ዘመርጡል ፡ ወሖሩ ፡ ይዑድዋ ፡ ለምድር ።

translations.lxx: These are the divisions which Eleazar the priest divided by lot, and Joshua the son of Naue, and the heads of families among the tribes of Israel, according to the lots, in Selo before the Lord by the doors of the tabernacle of testimony, and they went to take possession of the land.
translations.kjv: These are the inheritances, which Eleazar the priest, and Joshua the son of Nun, and the heads of the fathers of the tribes of the children of Israel, divided for an inheritance by lot in Shiloh before the LORD, at the door of the tabernacle of the congregation. So they made an end of dividing the country.
